title: Show HN: Cactus Hybrid: We taught Gemma 4 to know when it's wrong
summary: Cactus Hybrid 是一个开源项目，旨在通过训练 Gemma 4 模型识别自身错误来提高其可靠性。该项目在 GitHub 上发布，展示了如何让模型在不确定时主动表示“不知道”，从而减少幻觉和错误输出。
summary_en: Cactus Hybrid is an open-source project that improves the reliability of the Gemma 4 model by training it to recognize when it is wrong. It demonstrates how the model can actively indicate uncertainty, reducing hallucinations and incorrect outputs.
